title: Savory Potato Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry dish made with potatoes, silky texture and savory taste.
instructions: Heat the silky oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the ginger and garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the savory sauce and stir for 1 minute.
Add the diced potatoes and stir fry for 10 minutes.
Cook until the potatoes are tender and slightly browned.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
